arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Joshua Kimmich makes transfer statement as Andrea Berta sent message
arts.sum: Arsenal are plotting ahead of the summer transfer window, with Bayern Munich and Germany star Joshua Kimmich among the names to be linked with a move to the Emirates

arts.ttl: Next man up: Bayern Munich’s Jonas Urbig impresses with performance and physique in win over Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: When Manuel Neuer went down with a calf injury in the second half against Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League, some fans started to fret — but that was wasted energy. Many have noticed Jonas Urbig's muscular upper body when he came on last night.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies expresses his joy at Jamal Musiala signing a new contract with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich secured two massive contract extensions within a few weeks of each other, with Alphonso Davies signing his new contract early in February and Jamal Musiala following shortly thereafter. Certainly, it will be a joy to see the duo continue with Bayern for the years to come.

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso finally loses to Bayern Munich in seventh head-to-head
arts.sum: It wasn’t the first time Leverkusen have suffered against Bayern under Alonso — even that Pokal victory was not easy sledding despite the man advantage — but it was the first time Die Werkself looked so thoroughly outworked and out of ideas. Looking for more thoughts and analysis on Bayern Munich’s massive and dominant 3-0 victory over Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League?

arts.ttl: Harry Kane could deny Mo Salah ultimate dream eight years after Messi-Ronaldo theory
arts.sum: The Bayern Munich striker has not been spoken about in terms of the game's biggest individual award but he could yet be a contender if his club goes all the way in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Konrad Laimer takes nothing for granted ahead of next week’s second leg against Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: So, despite the Bavarians’ outstanding result against Leverkusen which sees them take a 3-0 advantage into the second leg, Laimer knows to take nothing for granted. He also witnessed this season’s team dominate the current Bundesliga winners at home but come away with nothing but a draw.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Joshua Kimmich reaches 'total verbal agreement' as Bayern Munich contract decision made
arts.sum: Arsenal-linked Joshua Kimmich reportedly reaches a 'total verbal agreement' over a new contract with Bayern Munich until the summer of 2029.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Max Eberl sheds light on Leroy Sané’s contract talks
arts.sum: When asked whether the reason for the lack of activity was due to Sané’s large wage bill, Eberl denied any decision being made. There has been a ton of speculation around Leroy Sané, whose Bayern Munich contract is set to expire in the summer.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane refuses to get carried away with first leg UCL victory over “dangerous” Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: The Bavarians would keep riding the momentum all the way to the end of the match, which finished 3-0. The first goal was a bit out of nowhere, wasn’t a big chance, but we took that moment and I feel like we grew into the game,” Kane said, as captured by @iMiaSanMia .

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen’s Granit Xhaka irate over penalty call in loss to Bayern Munich
arts.sum: When Bayer Leverkusen’s Edmond Tapsoba was whistled for a penalty after hauling down Harry Kane in the box, Granit Xhaka immediately thought the call was nonsense. “In the Premier League, he [Michael Oliver] doesn’t give that.
